India Edition

2026–27 Travel Planner

For working professionals who refuse to stop exploring.
13 windows AUG 2026 – JUN 2027 India holiday calendar

Every long weekend hiding in the calendar, matched to where the weather is actually good. Bridge a public holiday, plan the big trip around a school break, and never waste leave chasing the wrong season.

This is our personal 2026–27 calendar — save it, screenshot it, plan your year around it.

before you plan

How to use this planner

The secret to travelling well on a full-time job isn’t more leave — it’s knowing when to go where. We bridge public holidays into long weekends, plan the big trips around school and festival breaks, and always match the destination to the season.

✓ — Places we’ve been
✦ — On our wishlist
rest of 2026

August – October

Independence Day
Sat, Aug 15, 2026 · weekend — pair with Raksha Bandhan Aug 28
  • Bali ✦
  • Sri Lanka east coast ✓
  • East Africa safari ✦
Dussehra
Tue, Oct 20, 2026 · take Mon Oct 19 → 4-day break
  • Georgia ✓
  • Turkey ✓
  • South Africa ✓
  • Greece ✦
Diwali
Sun, Nov 8, 2026 · take Mon–Tue → long break
  • Maldives ✓
  • Sri Lanka south ✓
  • Singapore ✦
the big one

December – January

Christmas → New Year
Fri Dec 25, 2026 → Fri Jan 1, 2027 · take Dec 28–31 → 9-day stretch
  • Europe Christmas markets ✓
  • Lapland / Finland ✓
  • New York City (Christmas snow) ✓
  • Maldives ✓
  • Seychelles ✓
  • Sri Lanka south ✓
Makar Sankranti / Pongal
Thu, Jan 14, 2027 · take Fri Jan 15 → 4 days
  • New Zealand ✓
  • Vietnam ✦
  • Sri Lanka south ✓
Republic Day
Tue, Jan 26, 2027 · take Mon Jan 25 → 4 days
  • Maldives ✓
  • Seychelles ✓
  • Oman ✦
  • Singapore ✦
spring into summer

March – June 2027

Holi
Mon, Mar 22, 2027 · 3-day weekend, Mar 20–22
  • Turkey ✓
  • Jordan ✦
  • Japan (cherry blossoms) ✓
  • Central Asia ✦
Spring
April 2027
  • Netherlands (tulip season) ✓
  • Morocco ✓
  • Georgia ✓
Summer school holidays
Mid-May – June 2027 · the big Europe window
  • Switzerland ✦
  • Dolomites / Italy ✓
  • Scandinavia ✦
  • Iceland ✦
  • South Africa safari ✓
match the season to the place. then go.

No point burning precious leave somewhere mid-monsoon, in a heatwave, or off-season for what you came to see. Tag us @wanderingstampers when you travel!

@wanderingstampers

Dates are indicative — festival & Islamic-calendar holidays shift; confirm closer to the time. Some holidays vary by state.
